name: io.github.charleslucas/poemcp
title: PoeMCP - Path of Exile game data
description: MCP server for Path of Exile game data: wiki, economy, and Craft of Exile lookups

environmentVariables.name: POEMCP_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for the Craft of Exile data cache. Defaults to the platform user-cache dir (e.g. %LOCALAPPDATA%/poemcp on Windows, ~/.cache/poemcp elsewhere).
